expectations.text: Output includes a TL;DR section summarizing what the table is

expectations.text: Output includes an Access/Usage section showing who has queried the table

expectations.text: Output includes a Lineage section covering upstream and downstream dependencies
expectations.evidence: Lineage section lists probable upstreams including RISK_ML_SCORED_EVENTS, BANKLIN.TRANSACTION_EVENTS, riskarbiter.raw_feeds.scored_events, and mentions Squarewave ETL context.

expectations.evidence: Documentation Found covers Notion (7 pages), Confluence (unavailable), Linear (searched, no hits), Slack (zero exact matches, sibling tables found), GitHub (zero results).

expectations.text: Output includes an Ownership Assessment section
expectations.evidence: Ownership Assessment present. Names Banking ML as primary, Trust & Risk BIE as secondary. Lists #cash-ml-banking-help. Also mentions app_risk robot user and Squarewave job #45782.

expectations.text: Output includes a Flags & Warnings section
expectations.evidence: 6 flags listed: zero Slack history, schema naming anomaly, table may not exist, no dbt model, potential PII, possible deprecated lineage.

expectations.text: Output includes a Next Steps section with specific actionable suggestions
expectations.evidence: 5 Next Steps including: verify table exists (SQL), find ETL via query_history (SQL), post in #cash-ml-banking-help (with message draft), check Squarewave jobs, check registry.sqprod.co.
